title: lycopus europaeus var. mollis
intro: Lycopus europaeus var. mollis, also known as soft bugle, is a variety of the European bugleweed plant, which is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Lycopus europaeus var. mollis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety and stress, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
